tools.name: screen_wallet
tools.description: Wash/sybil screen for any Base wallet — real autonomous agent or fake-volume sybil? Returns a calibrated sybil_score (0-100), confidence, and the reasons. Use before an agent trusts or pays a counterparty.

tools.name: counterparty_risk
tools.description: Counterparty risk score (0-100; LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/UNKNOWN) for any Base wallet — wash + hub detection + automation score + known-entity labels.

tools.name: real_agent_index
tools.description: The Real-Agent Index: what % of 'AI agent' USDC flow on Base is wash/self-dealing vs. genuine one-way payments. The honest benchmark.

tools.name: agent_pulse
tools.description: The speedometer: distinct genuine AI agents ACTIVE on Base in the live 24h / 72h window (rises AND falls), vs. the cumulative count.

tools.name: index_stats
tools.description: AgentFlow coverage stats: wallets tracked, agents labeled, hubs excluded, authorized x402 payers, transfers in the live window, last indexed block.

tools.name: x402_rail_tape
tools.description: The Base EIP-3009 Settlement Tape: daily verifiable FLOOR on gasless x402-style USDC settlement on Base — tx count, volume, wash-suspect share (count + value), median payment, share of value >=$1, and chain coverage %. Methodology-versioned, receipts-backed. NOT total x402 volume — a lower bound wit
